name: Pork Roast with Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak clay pot for 15 minutes. If the bottom of your pot is glazed, spray it with non-stick spray and soak the top for 15 minutes.
2. Place the shredded red cabbage at the bottom of the pot. Salt and add lemon juice or vinegar to taste. Then add sugar, onion slices, apple slices, and wine.
3. Place the seasoned pork roast on top of the ingredients in the pot.
4. Cover and place the pot into a cold oven. Turn the temperature to 425 degrees F (220 C).
5. Bake for 2 1/2 hours.
This recipe is delicious!
